# Claude Code Agents for GTM: Artemis GTM Plugin Marketplace

<!-- Generated build (community (affiliate-free)). Do not edit by hand, regenerate with `node scripts/build-plugins.cjs`. -->

Installable Claude Code agents for B2B go-to-market work: run a guided GTM audit, find revenue leaks, check ICP fit, and stand up systems for speed to lead, outbound, lead scoring, and visitor deanonymization. Built by Artemis GTM from hands-on consulting engagements and packaged as standard Claude Code plugins.

## Quick install

```
/plugin marketplace add tomregan-revenueleaks/artemis-gtm-plugins-community
/plugin install gtm-audit@artemis-gtm
```

The free **gtm-audit** plugin is the one-install GTM Audit agent: the deep guided audit plus all six ROI / analyzer calculators as on-demand modules.

## What is a GTM agent for Claude Code?

A GTM agent is a packaged Claude Code skill that turns Claude into a go-to-market operator. It interviews you about your funnel, works through a proven framework, and produces real artifacts: audit reports, ICP scorecards, revenue-leak estimates, and implementation plans. Install once with the two commands above; updates arrive automatically through the marketplace.

## Free agents (full content)

- **gtm-audit**: GTM Audit (2 sub-agents)
- **gtm-engineer**: GTM Engineer (0 sub-agents)

## Paid agents

Not included in this (community) edition.
